scenes.narration: Jericho had the biggest walls anyone had ever seen. Nobody could get in. Nobody could get out.
scenes.image_prompt: Massive towering stone walls surrounding an ancient city, city of Jericho with tall gates and flags, bright colorful bible storybook illustration, dramatic morning light

scenes.narration: God told Joshua — march around the city once a day for six days. Don't say a word.
scenes.image_prompt: Joshua leading the Israelite army around the giant walls of Jericho in silence, priests with trumpets, bright colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Day one. Silence. Day two. Silence. Day three, four, five, six. Nothing happened.
scenes.image_prompt: Montage-style image of the Israelite army marching around Jericho with confused expressions, wall-guards laughing down from above, bright colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: The people of Jericho laughed from the walls. What were they even doing?
scenes.image_prompt: Jericho guards leaning over the giant walls pointing and laughing at the marching Israelites below, bright colorful funny bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Day seven. Joshua said — this time we march seven times. Then we shout.
scenes.image_prompt: Joshua raising his staff speaking boldly to his army at dawn, priests holding ram's horn trumpets, colorful bible storybook art, dramatic sunrise

scenes.narration: Around once. Twice. Six times. Seven. The trumpets blasted long and loud.
scenes.image_prompt: Priests blowing enormous ram's horn trumpets, army marching around the walls for the seventh time, bright colorful bible storybook illustration, golden hour light

scenes.narration: Then the whole army shouted with everything they had.
scenes.image_prompt: The Israelite army all shouting with hands raised to the sky, giant walls of Jericho behind them starting to crack, dramatic colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: And the giant walls — the biggest walls in the world — came crashing down flat.
scenes.image_prompt: The massive walls of Jericho collapsing in a dramatic cloud of dust and rubble, stones tumbling everywhere, Israelite army watching in awe, epic colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Sometimes God's plan sounds strange. But God's strange always works.
scenes.image_prompt: Joshua and the Israelite army standing victoriously on the rubble of Jericho's walls, bright sunshine breaking through, colorful joyful bible storybook illustration
